_primary_source: fpylll development team (2024) https://github.com/fplll/fpylll; Lenstra, Lenstra, Lovasz (1982) DOI:10.1007/BF01457454
description: Regression guard: the recorded 8-modulus fpylll sweep (m=9,24,27,81 unsafe; m=80,35,25,49 safe) matches the module's internal EMPIRICAL_RECORD_GENERALIZATION, so this historical result can't silently drift from what was actually run on 2026-07-04 via reproduce_fpylll_generalization.py
